_meta.author: isaiahbjork
_meta.title: Profile Card
_meta.description:
This is a high-fidelity Animated Profile Card component designed for user discovery or social interactions. It includes layered blur effects, animated reveal of bio/stats, motion-enhanced name rendering (letter-by-letter), and an interactive follow button. It adapts to theme and motion preferences, making it production-ready for profile previews in social apps, team dashboards, or creator platforms.

Perfect for social networks, SaaS teams, influencer marketplaces, or any UI needing rich identity previews with motion-driven engagement.
